data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'conditional questions based on responses.' However, the evidence provided only describes a single follow-up question triggered by a positive response, without detailing any conditional logic based on varied responses. This indicates a clear gap in the implementation of conditional questions, as the evidence does not demonstrate that the system can handle different response scenarios effectively.
gaps: Lack of evidence for conditional questions based on varied customer responses.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
